value.original: Percentage field is mandatory if Discount Type is Percentage

row.value: El campo Porcentaje es obligatorio cuando el Tipo de Descuento es Porcentaje

value.original: Combo Family Product is not associated in Assortment

row.value: Combo Family Product is not associated in Assortment

value.original: It is not possible to add a product more than once in any of the families that belong to the combo.

row.value: It is not possible to add a product more than once in any of the families that belong to the combo.

value.original: Discount for the type Combo is not associated with family

row.value: Discount for the type Combo is not associated with family

value.original: Fixed Price field is mandatory if Discount Type is Fixed Price

row.value: El campo Precio Fijo es obligatorio cuando el Tipo de Descuento es Precio Fijo

value.original: Fixed Discount field is mandatory if Discount Type is Fixed Discount

row.value: El campo Descuento Fijo es obligatorio cuando el Tipo de Descuento es Descuento Fijo

value.original: It is not possible to delete product if it is present in any of the Discount Combo family

row.value: It is not possible to delete product if it is present in any of the Discount Combo family
